gateway_leads_policy.name: gateway_leads_anon_insert_v2
gateway_leads_policy.with_check: ((COALESCE(length(TRIM(BOTH FROM name)), 0) > 0) AND (identity IS NOT NULL) AND (intent IS NOT NULL) AND (consent_to_contact IS NOT NULL) AND ((COALESCE(length(TRIM(BOTH FROM email)), 0) > 0) OR (COALESCE(length(TRIM(BOTH FROM contact)), 0) > 0) OR (COALESCE(length(TRIM(BOTH FROM phone)), 0) > 0)))
